    def test_config_with_ignore_hidden(temp_files):
        """Test config file with ignore-hidden option."""
        temp_files.create("visible.txt", "content")
        temp_files.create(".hidden.txt", "content")
    
        config = temp_files.create("config.toml", "ignore-hidden=true\n")

    def test_config_with_display_options(temp_files):

        config = temp_files.create("config.toml", """
    display-full-paths=true
    no-bars=true
    skip-total=true
    """)

    def test_depth_zero(temp_files):
        """Test depth 0 shows only top-level."""
        temp_files.create("dir1/file1.txt", "content1")
        temp_files.create("dir2/file2.txt", "content2")
    
        tempdir = Path(temp_files.path())
        result = run("-P", "-d", "0", str(tempdir / "dir1"), str(tempdir / "dir2"))
        assert result.returncode == 0
>       assert b"dir1" in result.stdout

temp_files = <conftest.temp_files.<locals>.TempFiles object at 0x7e3dd01135b0>

    def test_config_with_number_of_lines(temp_files):
        """Test config with number-of-lines option."""
        for i in range(20):
            temp_files.create(f"file{i}.txt", "content")
    
        config = temp_files.create("config.toml", "number-of-lines=5\nno-colors=true\n")
    
        result = run("-P", "--config", str(config), str(temp_files.path()))
        assert result.returncode == 0
        assert len(result.stdout) > 0
        lines = [l for l in result.stdout.split(b"\n") if l.strip()]
        # Should be limited
>       assert len(lines) <= 10
E       AssertionError

def test_hard_sym_link_no_dup_multi_arg():
        d1 = tempfile.mkdtemp()
        d2 = tempfile.mkdtemp()
        fpath = os.path.join(d1, "notes.txt")
        with open(fpath, "w") as f:
            f.write("I am a temp file\n")
        link = os.path.join(d2, "the_link")
        os.link(fpath, link)
    
        r = run_dust("-p", "-c", "-w", "999", "-b", d2, d1)
        out = r.stdout.decode()
        has_file_only = fpath in out and link not in out
        has_link_only = fpath not in out and link in out
>       assert has_file_only or has_link_only
E       AssertionError
